response.justification: Bogdan has deep technical breadth, strong open-source contributions, and leadership in project development, but lacks explicit evidence of executive-level IT architecture leadership, UML expertise, and German proficiency (only 'Basic'), which are critical for this role; his experience is more engineering-focused than strategic consulting leadership.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Proven full-stack engineering across diverse tech stacks and domains
Strong track record in mentoring, workshops, and knowledge sharing
concerns: German language proficiency is only 'Basic' — below required C1 level
No clear evidence of UML modeling or formal IT architecture design experience
Lacks documented experience in client advisory, requirements management, or compliance/risk governance
